title: Trailer Recreation++
description: Pretty much an even better version of Lowres' Trailer recreation pack!
body:
Ever thought "Huh, what if Lowres' pack was even better" Well lucky you! This pack aims to bring an **even better experience than ever!** _Also feel free to follow the project to support me!_

features include: -Third person model in first person for better immersion -ImmersiveMC for.. EVEN BETTER IMMERSION! -CameraOverhaul for butter-smooth Camera-movement -Veinminer and treechop -Crawling with a keybind(which works well in combination with veinminer) -Vivecraft to be **in the world** (Though you will need to disable the first mod i mentioned so it doesnt look.. odd. You can easily disable the mods abilities ingame with a key though! [F6 by default]) -And much more! I hope you enjoy my little addition to an already absurdly amazing modpack! ## Also feel free to check out Survival Additions [>HERE<](https://modrinth.com/modpack/survival-additions)
